text: Walking into an almost empty conference room, I am struck by the quiet anticipation held in neatly arranged chairs facing a blank screen. The sterile environment feels both expectant and solitary. Moving into the installation filled with vibrant colors and R+D, I am invigorated—here, creativity and intellect converge. I feel a sense of curiosity and optimism, as if the world is on the brink of some thoughtful discovery, waiting just beyond the next idea.
